1 No-Brainer Growth Stock to Buy Before It Soars Higher Oracle stock has risen impressively so far this year, and a recent development further improved investor confidence.  The Stargate Project will support high demand for the company's cloud infrastructure.  Oracle seems well-positioned to outpace Wall Street's growth forecasts, and that could translate into further stock price gains.

Why Oracle Stock Zoomed Nearly 13% Higher This Week On the back of positive remarks from the company's CEO and bolstered by an apparent deal with a major artificial intelligence (AI) developer, the stock's price resolutely headed north.  And although the OpenAI report is so far unconfirmed by Oracle, it also sounds like a potential money-spinner for the company.
